dossier.context: Goal: parse agentic CLI transcripts -> track agents/branches/commits/features for agent_stats. HARD CONSTRAINT: git author != agent (all commits antoinefa, no trailers) -> attribution from session evidence only. DESIGN: per-CLI parsers (Claude ~/.claude/projects/*/<uuid>.jsonl; Codex ~/.codex/sessions/.../rollout-*.jsonl; agy/Antigravity = the 'Gemini' host via ~/.gemini/) -> normalized SessionFact. Correlation by RANKED EVIDENCE: commit-sha-in-tool-output > Codex thread-ids (already embedded in Track dossiers) > h2a registry > worktree x branch x time-window > PR merge; NEVER git author. Store: dedicated .graphify/agents/ re-derivable store + THIN Track bridge (1 WorkEvent per milestone via existing track ingest; no new event kinds in MVP). Surface: graphify agent-stats CLI. RESOLUTIONS (user 2026-06-11): (1) code lives in graphify src/agent-stats/; (2) privacy: store ANONYMIZED citations/excerpts as evidence (like textual entities) - strip sensitive/personal data, never raw secrets/PII; (3) include agy/Antigravity in MVP (3 CLIs total); (4) adopt branch-naming convention (wpN/agent-topic) for attribution. MVP Phase0: Claude+Codex+agy parsers, this repo; acceptance = re-derive WP1 (wp1-repo-keys, PR#119) attribution from real transcripts.

- [ ] Conditional BR-EX2: `.track/**` only via `track branch import` bookkeeping, not staged in feature commits unless explicitly requested.

Studio windowed-first-paint: consume DB-backed graph_positions/window endpoint for initial large-graph render (server-side bounded scene), preserve neutral GraphStore provider model

Embedding provider neutrality: graphify must consume embeddings through sentropic LLM mesh / llm-gateway interfaces, not bind directly to Cohere/Ollama; DB/vector backends stay provider-neutral consumers

payload.body: Principal hard requirement (2026-07-09): reach parity with codeflow's graph experience. Layout registry Lot 0 + Variant A already DONE; NEW engines = radial/grid/metro. Key gap = smooth animated dynamics on our WebGL2 renderer (studio consumes one static frame; must interpolate PositionFrame stream on layout/slider change). Churn = new continuous scalar colour axis (sequential ramp). Curved-links = generalise flow-port S-curves to main graph. Codeflow is design/UX reference ONLY (no code copy; confirm licence). Open decisions D1 metro algo / D2 churn source / D3 anim engine / D4 worker-vs-main — see spec §6.
payload.title: Studio graph UX codeflow-parity: parametric layouts (Force/Radial/Layers/Grid/Metro) + Spread/Links sliders + Curved-links toggle + Color-by (Folder/Layer/Churn) + ANIMATED WebGL2 dynamics (frame-to-frame on layout/slider change) [spec/SPEC_STUDIO_GRAPH_UX_CODEFLOW_PARITY.md; ref braedonsaunders/codeflow]
